VAL-SPEC-005.evidence: EagleDraftHead generates exactly K draft tokens in valid range [0, vocab_size)

VAL-SPEC-006.evidence: Logits are FP32 of shape [vocab_size], not all zeros, greedy matches argmax

VAL-SPEC-007.evidence: EAGLE speculative output identical to standard decode when temperature=0

sharedStateObservations.observation: Temperature sampling acceptance rate is 0% because Metropolis-Hastings not implemented
sharedStateObservations.suggestedFix: Consider implementing MH acceptance for temperature > 0 in future

codeReviewNotes: EagleDraftHead correctly reuses lm_head weights for draft token generation
Integration with TPInferenceEngine works via set_eagle_mode()
